meta.description: Civic participation includes any theme, event, mention, or discussion related to citizen engagement, social movements, activism, and political participation. It considers protests, petitions, community organizing, voter participation, human rights advocacy, and civic demands. An article talks about civic participation whenever it addresses or touches any related subject — whether reporting a specific protest, discussing citizen organizing, covering political engagement, or mentioning social demands in passing. An article may match both this theme and a specific event schema (e.g. protest_event) — both are extracted separately.

example.description: Vecinos de diversas colonias se organizan para exigir mejoras en servicios publicos a traves de asambleas y peticiones formales.
example.context: El fenomeno de organizacion vecinal ha crecido tras las deficiencias en recoleccion de basura y abasto de agua.
example.government_response: El municipio abrio mesas de dialogo con representantes vecinales

theme_type.description: Type of civic participation theme. Choose the single most specific category that matches.

description.description: Summary of how the article touches or discusses civic participation — whether reporting a protest, covering citizen organizing, discussing political engagement, or mentioning social demands.

tags.description: Keywords and topics relevant to this civic participation theme.

context.description: Broader context: historical movements, policy background, social conditions driving participation.

relevance.description: Relevance of this theme within the article: 1 = main topic, 2 = secondary, 3 = implicit.

sentiment.description: General sentiment or tone of the discourse about civic participation.

location.description: Geographic area the civic participation theme pertains to. Fill only if explicitly about a specific area.

time_scope.description: The time period the article's civic participation discussion covers (e.g. '2025', 'ultimos meses'). Captures the temporal scope of the discourse.

movements_discussed.description: Social movements or causes discussed (e.g. 'movimiento ambiental', 'derechos laborales', 'organizacion vecinal').

organizations_mentioned.description: Civic organizations, activist groups, or community associations mentioned. Each organization separately.

demands_or_causes.description: The causes, demands, or issues driving civic participation. Each demand or cause separately.

government_response.description: Government or institutional response to civic demands, if mentioned.

participation_forms.description: Forms of civic participation discussed (e.g. 'protesta', 'peticion', 'asamblea', 'consulta publica', 'voto'). Each form separately.
